india_trends.title: Air China resumes Delhi-Beijing non-stop flight
india_trends.summary: Air connectivity between India and China is being restored. Air China and China Eastern Airlines have resumed flights connecting Delhi and Beijing, and Kunming and Kolkata respectively. IndiGo has also expanded its services to Shanghai and Guangzhou. india_trends.title: Tech Mahindra rebounds from a two-year revenue decline
india_trends.summary: India’s fifth-largest IT services company saw nearly 2% growth in FY26 revenue to $6.39 billion, beating street expectations.

india_trends.title: Tata Communications Q4 Results: Profit falls 75% YoY to Rs 259 crore; co declares Rs 17.5 dividend
india_trends.summary: Tata Communications reported a 75% YoY drop in Q4 profit to Rs 259 crore due to absence of one-off gains, despite 9% revenue growth. Higher costs and base effects pressured margins, while the company announced a Rs 17.5 dividend.

india_trends.title: West Asia crisis: Govt considering customs duty cut on critical induction cooktop components
india_trends.summary: In a bid to enhance accessibility to induction cooktops, the government is contemplating a reduction in import duties on components. Additionally, discussions are underway for lowering the Goods and Services Tax to make these energy-efficient appliances more budget-friendly.

india_trends.title: Valuation Check: 9 midcap stocks trading well above industry PE
india_trends.summary: Midcap stocks with P/E ratios above industry averages signal strong growth expectations and investor confidence. However, elevated valuations may also indicate overpricing risks. This list highlights ten such NSE stocks, excluding financials, identified through valuation screening.

india_trends.title: Allianz, Jio Financial Services ink 50:50 insurance JV to tap India’s growing market
india_trends.summary: Jio Financial Services and Allianz Group are partnering to launch a new insurance venture in India. This 50:50 joint venture will offer general and health insurance solutions. india_trends.title: Tata’s Trent catches a trend as spending shifts beyond Bengaluru & Mumbai
india_trends.summary: Trent is expanding its retail footprint beyond metro cities, focusing on Tier II and III locations with its Zudio and Westside formats to tap growing income and economic activity. india_trends.title: OpenAI taps Airbnb executive Emmanuel Marill as first managing director for Europe, West Asia, Africa
india_trends.summary: Emmanuel Marill will be tasked with the expansion of ChatGPT’s parent company in key markets, where political pressure is mounting about over-reliance on US artificial intelligence services.

india_trends.title: RBI measures on currency temporary to curb volatility, says deputy governor Sankar
india_trends.summary: The Reserve Bank of India's deputy governor stated that temporary curbs on banks' currency trading will be lifted soon. These measures were put in place to manage rupee volatility. The central bank remains committed to its long-term goals of rupee internationalization and a unified dollar-rupee mark

india_trends.title: Pay Point India becomes first fintech to join RBI's Centralised Payment System
india_trends.summary: With this membership, Pay Point India now has direct access to key payment systems—Real Time Gross Settlement and National Electronic Funds Transfer—without relying on partner banks.
